creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 227055
Patch to update deskutils/elementary-calendar

- Update to 6.0.0
- Adjust dependencies
- Add one patch, in order to replace org.freedesktop.login1 service by  org.freedesktop.ConsoleKit

Note: one feature is missing, we are not able to connect online accounts. It requires switchboard-plug-onlineaccounts, switchboard (GNOME control center like), and gala (window manager for the Elementary desktop). I'm working to adapt this desktop to FreeBSD, but currently it is not yet ready.
